title: scorzoneroides autumnalis var. pinnatifida
intro: Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. pinnatifida, also known as autumnal knawel or pinnate autumnal knawel, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) with pinnate leaves and a yellow flower head. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and certain types of cancer, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. pinnatifida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
